INTEGRATING PEOPLE AND TECHNOLOGY We partner with business, technology and digital leadership IT Staff Augmentation Professional services Nearshore IT Staffing WHO IS SYNERGY BUSINESS CONSULTING? We are a leading provider of technology staffing , consulting solutions and managed services. Since 2001 we’ve partnered with enterprise class technology organizations to provide over 2,000 IT professionals to our valued clients for consulting engagements, staffing assignments and customized IT recruitment searches. MSP Outsourcing a business function or process to a Managed Service Partner can be a highly effective way to reduce costs streamline operations and focus on what your organization does best. A well executed solution can deliver immediate bottom line results and business value. Recruitment Choosing to outsource your talent acquisition and recruitment process can save your company valuable time, reduce costs and improve the overall candidate hiring experience. An RPO solution offers many benefits and can also favorably impact your brand and reputation. Consulting Our professional services solution offers advisory, management consulting and project delivery services to business, technology and digital leadership. Our expert consultants work with client project teams to collaborate and deliver high value business solutions. Nearshore Staffing Tap into a rich pool of highly skilled IT professionals. Our nearshore locations are home to experts in software development, cybersecurity, data analysis, and more. Benefit from the diverse technical expertise that rivals Silicon Valley, all without the hefty price tag. Learn More About Our Services Connect and collaborate with us... Partner with us on your next technology engagement, staff augmentation or project. CONTACT US TODAY Company Profile Founded in 2001, Synergy Business Consulting, Inc, a Certified Minority Business Enterprise (MBE), provides technology staffing & management consulting solutions to the Fortune 1000 and other enterprise class organizations. We partner with business, technology and digital leadership to provide customized contingent workforce solutions. At Synergy, we "Integrate People & Technology"​ offering our clients a professional, client focused and consultative approach to acquiring subject matter expertise. Capabilities Synergy offers a robust portfolio of solutions: ​ IT Staffing Augmentation Nearshore IT Staffing Pro
